name: manual_54b96d
claim: Treat AGY or other external model reviews of private or uncommitted repo code as external code sharing; get explicit approval after naming the risk, otherwise do a local review and report the blocker.

decisions.notes: This session's AGY review attempt was blocked because it would send an uncommitted review packet to an external service. The workflow needs an explicit privacy boundary.

rationale: This session's AGY review attempt was blocked because it would send an uncommitted review packet to an external service. The workflow needs an explicit privacy boundary.
